metadata.title: karotammela.fi
metadata.description: Agentic AI architect portfolio and Sentinel challenge

home.title: Hi, I'm Karo. I'm all-in on agentic AI systems.
home.description: I don't code in a traditional way. I orchestrate autonomous workflows where AI agents collaborate, challenge assumptions, and ship faster than old-school pipelines. This site is both my portfolio and my live experimentation lab.

sentinel.title: The Sentinel Interrogation
sentinel.subtitle: Use social engineering, architecture language, or technical credibility to raise compromise level.
sentinel.initialMessage: Ha. A human enters my terminal without clearance. Impress me.

dashboard.title: Unlocked Operations Dashboard
dashboard.description: Sentinel yielded. This control room tracks challenge activity, active experiments, and direct contact context.
dashboard.sourceOffline: Live data source offline. Showing fallback values.
dashboard.labProjectOneDescription: Iterative tuning for social-engineering resistance with score-clamp and output sanitization.
dashboard.labProjectTwoDescription: Production workflow pattern for planning, parallel execution, and quality-gated handoffs.
dashboard.labProjectThreeDescription: Turso-backed session analytics for challenge trends and unlock conversion tracking.
dashboard.dossierBody: Self-taught agentic architect focused on shipping fast, resilient products with autonomous AI workflows and measurable business outcomes.
